dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5795 IH: Deportation Disclosure Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Biggs of Arizona introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To make orders of removal publicly available, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Deportation Disclosure Act.
Section 240 of the Immigration and Nationality Act (8 U.S.C. 1229a) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subsection (e) as subsection (f); and
by inserting after subsection (d) the following:

subsection.header: Publication of final orders of removal
subsection.text: The Secretary of Homeland Security shall publish on the website of the Department of Homeland Security the name of each individual who has received a final order of removal after the date of enactment of this subsection, along with—

paragraph.text: any aliases of the individual; and
the last known State in which the individual resided.
